role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Analyzed English text ('Winners', 'HOLDS HERE') and script type (Latin).
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed soil color (laterite), terrain (flat), and settlement patterns (walls).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (savanna scrub, palms) and biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road surface (unpaved), infrastructure (walls, poles), and vehicle types.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera generation, architectural style) to distinguish Nigeria from Ghana.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Nigeria. The agents stayed within their domains, providing concrete evidence (soil, walls, vegetation) that was accurately reflected in the image. The meta agent provided the strongest differentiating evidence (camera hood, wall style) to win the final match against Ghana.

visual_consistency_notes.meta: Camera hood and wall styles match image.
